values.centimes: The 2024 application circular requires invoices to show the definitive 19.25% and 9.9% rates; the 2026 circular continues the provincial and communal centimes allocation
values.largeOperation: 2026 Article 229 V override applies only when a confirmed IGL taxpayer performs one operation above, not equal to, XAF 50,000,000
values.reduced: 9.9% effective invoice rate: 9% base VAT plus 10% centimes, only for the Article 238 scope
values.roundingBoundary: CGI Article 235 says taxable bases are rounded down to the nearest thousand; this invoice estimator preserves entered cents and flags that filing adjustment for adviser review
values.standard: 19.25% effective invoice rate: 17.5% base VAT plus 10% centimes on that base VAT
values.zero: 0% only for listed exports, international transport and outbound Jet A1 supplies
